name: ecommerce-conversion-psychology
description: E-commerce Psychology toolkit for ecommerce pages using research-backed psychology

plugins.name: ecp
plugins.description: E-commerce Psychology toolkit for ecommerce pages, powered by 900+ research-backed findings across pricing, trust, SEO, mobile, visual design, content, and checkout. Audit existing pages or build from scratch with evidence-backed recommendations. Commands: /ecp:audit (full relay), /ecp:build (from scratch), /ecp:quick-scan (fast single-focus), /ecp:compare (competitor gap analysis), /ecp:resume (pick up where you left off). Screenshot-only input, annotated visual reports, ethics compliance, dark chrome design system. Platform-aware (Shopify, Next.js, OpenCart, WooCommerce).
